# Frozen self-host bootstrap ELF (A6): the driver-bearing native compiler that
# reproduces itself byte-identically (stage1==stage2==stage3). Regenerate via
# self_host_loop_smoke.py with MINDC_SO set. NOT skippable in CI.
# name	size_bytes	sha256
stage1.elf	1159317	03e18b8f4f1b56aaceaef34053fbb090f0ed3477c38525185f633f6d6bb98273
